deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ -f /run/secrets/relay_token ]; then exec c2c relay serve --listen 0.0.0.0:${PORT} --token-file /run/secrets/relay_token --storage sqlite --db-path /data/relay.db; elif [ -n "${RELAY_TOKEN:-}" ]; then exec c2c relay serve --listen 0.0.0.0:${PORT} --token "${RELAY_TOKEN}" --storage sqlite --db-path /data/relay.db; else exec c2c relay serve --listen 0.0.0.0:${PORT} --storage sqlite --db-path /data/relay.db; fi'
